## Plugin checklist

- [ ] `plugin.json` has `name`, `version`, `description`, `author`, `keywords`
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has `name` and `description` in frontmatter
- [ ] `README.md` exists in the plugin root
- [ ] `version` in `plugin.json` is bumped appropriately (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `bash scripts/validate-plugins.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Tested by installing locally: `/plugin install <name>@yalesites-claude-plugins`
